description_long: This house features a whimsical, slightly asymmetrical design with a dark, multi-faceted gable roof and a wraparound balcony adorned with potted plants and flower boxes. The exterior walls are a mix of gray concrete and wood paneling, with large, irregularly shaped windows providing ample natural light. The balcony is supported by sturdy columns and surrounded by a black metal railing, while the base is set on a stone-paved platform. The roof is detailed with multiple chimneys, vents, and an antenna, adding to its urban character. Visible pipes and utility fixtures on the exterior hint at a modern, functional infrastructure. Decorative elements such as flower boxes, potted plants, and a small porch area enhance the house's inviting, lived-in appearance.
description: A quirky, urban house with a dark gable roof, wraparound balcony, and large windows, featuring flower boxes and visible utility fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large central window, balcony with flower boxes, and potted plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the balcony's depth, rooftop chimneys, and additional potted plants along the railing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals more windows, visible utility pipes, and a large ground-floor window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays two upper windows with flower boxes, roof antenna, and more exposed piping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture and bay windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small porch with steps, a single door, and decorative flower boxes along the balcony railing.
